purpose: ingest the user's own sent iMessage/SMS prose (chat.db, is_from_me=1) as an identity-baseline corpus, one entry per redacted-contact/local-day bundle, for the personal voice_profile baseline (not the impostor pool).
use_when: building the personal identity baseline from the user's own outgoing iMessage/SMS prose, a short-form mobile-composed register
do_not_use_when: a keyboard-composed email register is wanted instead (use acquire_gmail_sent)
received or third-party messages would be included (this reads is_from_me=1 only, by design)

inputs.target: local macOS Messages SQLite database (~/Library/Messages/chat.db), read-only; requires Full Disk Access for the invoking process

artifacts: contact_map.json (redacted contact_NN -> raw handle; KEEP PRIVATE)

compute.cost_note: local SQLite scan of outgoing rows inside the date window; no network; best-effort attributedBody byte-scan with fail-closed reply drop
